layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for buttons

animations.scroll_reveal: Framer motion fade-in-up with 0.6s duration and ease-out
animations.hover: Subtle scale up (1.02) and image darkening for text contrast

components.button: Pill-shaped (rounded-full), px-8 py-4, uppercase tracking-widest text-xs or sm font-medium
components.card: Minimalist, no heavy shadows. 1px solid border in light mode, soft background in dark mode.
components.input: Underline only (border-b) or softly rounded with bg-secondary, clean padding

sections_instructions.header: Sticky nav with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-md). Includes Language Switcher (PL/EN/UA dropdown) and Theme Toggle. Hide nav links behind hamburger on mobile only.
sections_instructions.hero: Full height or 90vh. Use background image with overlay bg-black/40 or gradient to transparent to ensure text readability. Heading should use Cormorant Garamond text-5xl to 7xl. Two buttons: Primary for Booksy, secondary (outline/ghost) for Oferta.
sections_instructions.about: Use a subtle bento grid or asymmetrical 4-card layout for the values. Large typography for 'Poznaj Moon Beauty Space'.
sections_instructions.services: Grid layout. 1 col mobile, 2 cols tablet, 4 cols desktop. Image on top, elegant title below, simple text link or button. Hovering the card should slightly scale the image.
sections_instructions.why_us: 4 icon blocks. Use lucide-react with thin stroke widths (strokeWidth={1}). Soft background colors for the icon wrappers.
sections_instructions.gallery: Grid of 6 images. Use masonry style or varying row spans (e.g. col-span-2 row-span-2 for one hero gallery image) to create an artful layout. Smooth hover zoom. Ensure object-cover.
sections_instructions.reviews: Use a marquee (react-fast-marquee) or simple CSS scroll for testimonial cards. Display 4.9 stars prominently. Minimalist cards.
sections_instructions.booking: Split layout: Contact form on left, salon info/image on right. Inputs must be accessible, minimal design. Include success state handling. Primary button for submit, outline button for Booksy.
sections_instructions.location: Darker contrasting section or soft beige. Address details clearly visible. Two buttons: Zadzwoń and Nawigacja.
sections_instructions.footer: Large brand name 'MOON' at the top/bottom. Links organized cleanly. Neutral/dark colors depending on theme mode.

tech_rules.i18n: Use simple React context or translation objects to toggle languages (PL/EN/UA)
tech_rules.accessibility: Contrast ratios > 4.5:1. Use semantic HTML. Include data-testid on interactive elements (e.g. data-testid="booking-submit-button").
